items.prompt: A coverpoint with bins low, mid, high, top over data[3:0] mainly…
choices: Partitions the 4-bit field into named buckets for hit tracking
items.explain: Bins group values; sampling increments hits so you can see what was exercised.

items.prompt: Sample value 5 hits which nibble bin in the starter sketch?
items.explain: 5 falls in the mid range; the starter already shows one mid hit from sample 5.

items.prompt: A defined bin with zero hits after testing is called a…
items.explain: Holes flag coverage gaps—you may need directed tests to hit that bin.

items.prompt: If a sampled value is not in any bin, that indicates a modeling gap—not just low random effort.
items.explain: Values outside all bins (e.g. FIFO level 6 in the fifo preset) are not tracked until bins are fixed.
